creator: fk@fabiankeil.de
text:
The attached patch updates net-mgmt/vidalia from 0.1.14 to 0.2.7.

Unless I missed something, this is the first 0.2.x release that has been declared stable.

The ChangeLog is available at:
https://trac.vidalia-project.net/browser/vidalia/tags/vidalia-0.2.7/CHANGELOG?rev=4206

Fix: Patch attached with submission follows:
